title: Along with the Gods: The Two Worlds
posterAlt: Along with the Gods: The Two Worlds (2017) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Having died unexpectedly, firefighter Ja-hong is taken to the afterlife by 3 afterlife guardians. Only when he passes 7 trials over 49 days and proves he was innocent in human life, he’s able to reincarnate, and his 3 afterlife guardians are by his side to defend him in trial.
synopsis: Released in 2017, Along with the Gods: The Two Worlds is a action, adventure and drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
